name: Prende_Recaudadoras
wl_code:
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1 THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 347, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 348, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 349, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 350, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
ELSE
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 347, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 348, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 349, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 350, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
END
Menu_Comerical()
Local procedure Verifica_EdicionprgBien
